title: Digimon Redux
description: Explore the expansive and open world of Digimon
body:
![Features Picture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/626a987d22fa4d126d879c2c5636afe9f49eefa2.png) Digimon Redux is a small sized modpack that focuses on The Digimon mod, If your looking for a challenge you can play. Using progression through structures; And much more! But beware of the creatures that roam. Digimon Redux is a pack that focusses on the finding and taming of Digimon, Digimon are mobs which will fight for you similar to dogs in Minecraft. The battle system and the modpack in general is similar to mods like Cobblemon or Pixelmon in how they are used but not to be confused with these as they are based around different shows.

Features of DR include

  • Structures
  • Digimon Combat System
  • Over 100 new biomes to explore
    •  

    Requirements

    Minimum requirements: 4GB Minimum, 5-6GB Recommended  

    Install Guide

    Steps to install DR include
  • Install Modrinth Launcher: https://modrinth.com/
  • Ensure enough RAM is Allocated to run pack
  • Search 'Digimon Redux' in modpacks, and click install
    •  
    OFFICIAL DIGIMOD DISCORD

    Comment if you make a video to be featured on the page <3
